---
title: "The Rt. Hon. William Ewart Gladstone"
---

## The Rt. Hon. William Ewart Gladstone

**Dates:** 1809-1898

### Description

Prime Minister

### Biography

He was loathed and mistrusted by CMY, no doubt because, being High Church and having begun as a Conservative, he should have known better than to associate with liberals and advocates of non-denominational education.

### Letters

- [To Sir Walter Besant, Febry 7th [1899?][[footnote:1]]](../letters/3394_To_Sir_Walter_Besant.html)
- Letter from February 27 [1886]] 
- Letter from [December 1885?]
- Letter from [autumn 1885]
- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]
- Letter from August 6. [1869]
- Letter from July 20 1867
- Letter from Feb 6th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
